what: Create SQLite-backed ProjectRepository adapter with schema, row mapping, and unique path enforcement for create/read/list/archive/restore data operations.

where.description: Implement repository adapter methods using SQLite statements and typed mapping.
Add integration tests against real SQLite test database.
Create projects table with required columns and unique constraint on canonical path.

acceptance.when: Repository save and then find/list methods are executed
acceptance.then: Returned project data matches persisted values including timestamps and archive state.

acceptance.given: Two create operations with same canonical path
acceptance.then: Adapter returns duplicate-path repository error and first record remains unchanged.

patterns.name: Infrastructure Adapter
patterns.reference: ARCHITECTURE.md section 2 adapter implementation in infrastructure

patterns.name: Repository Pattern
patterns.reference: ARCHITECTURE.md section 3 repository interface + concrete implementation

context: Application logic needs durable project storage and deterministic constraints to behave consistently across sessions.
technicalNotes: Use integration tests first to lock SQL behavior. Ensure unique path constraint is database-level, not only application-level. Merge-safe: migration + adapter + tests only. Models: Codex gpt-5.3-codex (high), Claude Opus 4.6 (high).
